subject: Sports
title: The Block: LeBron's Defining Play
description: A quick, practical guide to The Block: LeBron's Defining Play.

hook.text: Game 7 of the 2016 Finals. Two minutes left. Tied game. One chase-down block changed everything.

buildup.text: The Cavaliers trailed the Warriors 3-1 in the series. No team had ever come back from that deficit.

discovery.text: Andre Iguodala had a clear path to a go-ahead layup. LeBron sprinted from behind and pinned it on the glass.

twist.text: LeBron had run the full length of the court to make the block—a superhuman athletic feat in a deciding game.

climax.text: Cleveland won the title—the city's first major championship in 52 years. LeBron wept on the court.

punchline.text: One block ended a 52-year championship drought.

quiz.question: What was historic about the Cavaliers' 2016 Finals comeback?
options: They came back from a 3-1 series deficit—a first in Finals history
They won every game by 20 points
It was the first Finals played outdoors
